rationale: Educ. Code §39.334 mandates a biennial technology report on long-range technology plan implementation. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraised value thresholds.
quote: The agency shall prepare and deliver to the governor, the lieutenant governor, the speaker of the house of representatives, each member of the legislature, the Legislative Budget Board, and the clerks of the standing committees of the senate and house of representatives with primary jurisdiction over the public school system a technology report covering the preceding two school years and containing information on the status of the implementation of and revisions to the long-range technology plan required by Section 32.001, including the equity of the distribution and use of technology in public schools.
_note: No conflict. This statute concerns technology reporting requirements and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal.
